name: Transformation
domain: Fourier/Laplace transforms, phase transitions, coordinate changes, morphisms
core_insight: Transformation changes the representation without changing the content. The Fourier transform reveals the frequency structure hidden in time-domain signals. Phase transitions are transformations of state where symmetry abruptly changes. The Legendre transform swaps variables, converting between conjugate descriptions.

key_equations.name: Fourier Transform
key_equations.why: Converts time-domain signal to frequency-domain spectrum — the same information, different basis

key_equations.name: Phase Transition
key_equations.why: Thermodynamic transformation: free energy's second derivative jumps at the transition point

key_equations.name: Legendre Transform
key_equations.formula: G(p) = f(x) - px where p = df/dx
key_equations.why: Swaps variable and its conjugate: converts internal energy to enthalpy, Lagrangian to Hamiltonian

seed_prompt: ↻ What is preserved under this transformation? Change the basis. The invariants are the truth.
